description: Source list for RTO regulatory news monitoring. RSS preferred where available (verified 2026-05-25). HTML sources may be blocked by bot protection or JS rendering — those failures are expected and logged for manual review.

sources.name: ASQA News
sources.notes: Primary RTO regulator. Highest signal source. RSS verified working.

sources.name: Skills Insight
sources.notes: Jobs and Skills Council. Training package development updates. RSS verified working.

sources.name: TEQSA News
sources.notes: Higher education regulator. Relevant for dual-sector RTOs. RSS verified working.

sources.name: training.gov.au
sources.notes: No RSS available. May return bot-protection page — log if blocked.

sources.name: DEWR Skills and Training
sources.notes: No RSS available. May return bot-protection page — log if blocked.

sources.name: ITECA News
sources.notes: No RSS available. Known to use Cloudflare protection — likely to fail until Playwright is added.

sources.name: VELG Training Blog
sources.notes: No RSS available. JS-rendered content — likely to fail until Playwright is added.

sources.name: NCVER News
sources.notes: No RSS available. May return bot-protection page — log if blocked.

sources.name: ASIC Newsroom
sources.notes: No RSS available. Filter heavily — most ASIC news is not RTO-relevant.

sources.name: Home Affairs CRICOS
sources.notes: No RSS available. International student RTO requirements only.
